scenes.description: Shiranui Flare, Houshou Marine, and Omaru Polka perform "Triangle Dreamer" during Shiranui Flare's Birthday 3D Live.

subtitles.original: トライアングル・ドリーマー
subtitles.english: Triangle Dreamer

subtitles.original: #不知火フレア生誕祭2026
subtitles.english: #ShiranuiFlareBirthday2026

subtitles.original: Aクラスななめ　眩暈のおとなしい人
subtitles.english: A-class, a tilt, a quiet person who makes me dizzy

subtitles.original: カッコよくはない　だけど優しい
subtitles.english: He's not cool, but he's kind

subtitles.original: いつも頼れる彼
subtitles.english: The guy I can always rely on

subtitles.original: 多角的恋愛相談の帰り道
subtitles.english: On the way home from a multi-angled love consultation

subtitles.original: なんだって話せる親友の女の子
subtitles.english: My best friend girl I can talk to about anything

subtitles.original: スポーツ万能　勉強もできて
subtitles.english: She's good at sports and studying

subtitles.original: 女子力マックスです
subtitles.english: And her girl power is at its max

subtitles.original: どこにでもある　よくあること
subtitles.english: It's a common thing that happens everywhere

subtitles.original: 急に彼女が
subtitles.english: Suddenly, she said...

subtitles.original: 「あのね、実は私好きな人がいるの」って
subtitles.english: "Hey, actually, there's someone I like"

subtitles.original: ちょ、マジで！？
subtitles.english: Wait, for real!?

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は気まぐれ
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is fickle

subtitles.original: 一瞬で　一瞬で崩れるバランス
subtitles.english: In an instant, the balance collapses

subtitles.original: ベタな漫画みたいなフラグ
subtitles.english: A cliché manga-like flag

subtitles.original: まさか自分も立てちゃうなんて残念すぎます
subtitles.english: I can't believe I'm setting one up too, it's so unfortunate

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は不安定
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is unstable

subtitles.original: なんちゃって　なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
subtitles.english: "Just kidding" isn't enough for this category

subtitles.original: 恋と友情　ゆらゆら揺れてなんか
subtitles.english: Love and friendship, swaying back and forth

subtitles.original: 青春しちゃってます
subtitles.english: I'm having a real youth moment

subtitles.original: 私、困っちゃってます
subtitles.english: I'm in quite a bind

subtitles.original: 完敗です　お似合いすぎるわ　さてこんな日
subtitles.english: A total loss, they suit each other too well. Now, on a day like this...

subtitles.original: 悔しいけど　どうかそんなんじゃなくて本心
subtitles.english: It's frustrating, but please, I don't mean it that way, I'm being serious

subtitles.original: っていうか既に応援モード　むしろ清々しい
subtitles.english: Actually, I'm already in cheering mode, it's rather refreshing

subtitles.original: だけど彼女は不思議な顔
subtitles.english: But she has a mysterious look on her face

subtitles.original: 真剣な目で
subtitles.english: With serious eyes...

subtitles.original: 「そうじゃなくて　私、あなたが　好き、ごめん」って
subtitles.english: ...she said, "No, I mean I like YOU, I'm sorry"

subtitles.original: ちょ、マジで！？
subtitles.english: Wait, for real!?

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は気まぐれ
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is fickle

subtitles.original: 一瞬で　一瞬で崩れるバランス
subtitles.english: In an instant, the balance collapses

subtitles.original: 私、あなた、彼女と私
subtitles.english: Me, you, her and me

subtitles.original: 超絶複雑　百合展開は想定外です
subtitles.english: Extremely complex, a Yuri development was unexpected

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は不安定
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is unstable

subtitles.original: なんちゃって　なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
subtitles.english: "Just kidding" isn't enough for this category

subtitles.original: 解けないパズル与え給うた神よ　恨んじゃいます
subtitles.english: Oh God who gave me this unsolvable puzzle, I'll resent you

subtitles.original: 私、悩んじゃいます
subtitles.english: I'm so troubled

subtitles.original: あーもう！すごいヤバい！
subtitles.english: Ah, jeez! This is so bad!

subtitles.original: えっ、何！？　嬉しいけど、えっ、そういう意味じゃなくて！
subtitles.english: Eh, what!? I'm happy but, eh, that's not what I meant!

subtitles.original: だって、女の子同士だし…！　ねぇ、神様、どうしたらいいの！？
subtitles.english: But, we're both girls...! Hey, God, what should I do!?

subtitles.original: 私、どうしたいの！？　ヘルプ・ミー！
subtitles.english: What do I want to do!? Help me!

subtitles.original: なんか変だ！愛に国境も、年も、性別も関係ない！
subtitles.english: Something's strange! Love has no borders, age, or gender doesn't matter!

subtitles.original: けど！けど！けど！
subtitles.english: But! But! But!

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は気まぐれ
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is fickle

subtitles.original: 一瞬で　一瞬で崩れるバランス
subtitles.english: In an instant, the balance collapses

subtitles.original: 普通の恋、夢見てたのになのに
subtitles.english: I was dreaming of a normal love, and yet...

subtitles.original: ノーマル捨てての私じゃちょっと無理ゲーすぎます
subtitles.english: Abandoning my normal self is a bit too much of a "broken game" for me

subtitles.original: 三角形　三角形の恋は不安定
subtitles.english: Triangle, a triangle love is unstable

subtitles.original: なんちゃって　なんちゃってじゃ済まないカテゴリー
subtitles.english: "Just kidding" isn't enough for this category

subtitles.original: 彼女のこと好きになれたらなんて妄想しちゃいます
subtitles.english: I start to fantasize about if I could fall in love with her

subtitles.original: 私、おかしくなってます
subtitles.english: I'm going crazy
